query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'colaboradores' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%formac%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%habilid%');
